THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMES, CHRIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 64 TURK STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUN-20-2002, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC. NO RENT AND DAMAGES DUE IF DEFT. VACATES TIMELY. IF NOT AMENDED JUDGMENT SHALL BE SOUGHT IN TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,694.26 AND COST OF $191.00 SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR ADDITIONAL SPECIFIC DETAILS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER RHONDA AQUILINA. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-17-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 303, PERKER MEEKS.
MINUTES FOR JUN-17-2002 10:00 AM FOR DEPT 303
